title: Children's social work workforce 2021
body: "This statistical release uses data from the statutory children’s social work workforce data collection.  It covers:   number of social workers number of starters and leavers vacancy rate of social workers turnover rate of social workers sickness absence of social workers number of agency workers   Data was collected from local authorities.   Children’s services statistics team     Email CSWW.STATS@education.gov.uk         "
